candidate_definitions.text: Add context awareness to your apps and frameworks by safely evaluating user-defined conditional expressions. Useful for evaluating expressions in config files, prompts, key bindings, completions, templates, and many other user cases.

> Add context awareness to your apps and frameworks by safely evaluating user-defined conditional expressions. Useful for evaluating expressions in config files, prompts, key bindings, completions, templates, and many other user cases.
